parsed.production_notes: The video features a human presenter recorded against a green screen, with various backgrounds added in post-production. The presenter's movements, facial expressions, and lip-sync are natural, showing no signs of AI generation.

characters.appearance: Young Asian male in his 20s. He has a slim build, fair complexion, and short black hair parted on the side. He has clean facial features with no distinguishing marks.
characters.wardrobe: He wears an olive green jacket over a black shirt. He has white wired earphones plugged in.
characters.demeanor: Enthusiastic, engaging, and persuasive. He uses frequent hand gestures to emphasize his points.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is positioned in the lower center of the frame. He is looking directly at the camera and speaking. He holds the microphone of his wired earphones near his mouth with his right hand. He uses his left hand to make gestures.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is superimposed over a series of news article screenshots. The articles are from the Wall Street Journal, TechCrunch, and The Guardian. The headlines discuss the trend of voice dictation replacing typing. Captions appear over Character A's chest.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: Typing is being replaced by whispering. [Typing is being replaced by whispering.]
Character A says: It's literally a Wall Street Journal headline, front page. [It's literally a Wall Street Journal headline, front page.]
Character A says: TechCrunch is calling it the whisper-filled office of the future. [TechCrunch is calling it the whisper-filled office of the future.]
Character A says: The Guardian is calling people who've switched voice-pilled. [The Guardian is calling people who've switched voice-pilled.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
WSJ
TECHNOLOGY
Typing Is Being Replaced by Whispering-and It's Way More Annoying
Workspaces are starting to resemble high-end call centers, only these employees are talking to AI; 'it's just a little awkward'
By Kate Clark
May 10, 2026 at 5:30 am ET

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A sits at a desk in a bedroom. He is wearing a dark grey t-shirt. The desk has a laptop, a monitor with a light bar, and a microphone on a boom arm. A bed and a corkboard are visible in the background. He is gesturing with his hands while looking at the monitor.
Character A is positioned in the lower right of the frame. He is looking directly at the camera and speaking. He holds the microphone of his wired earphones near his mouth with his right hand.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is superimposed over a video of himself working at a desk. He is explaining his personal experience with voice dictation. Captions appear over his chest.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: And I've actually been doing this for months without even realizing it was a thing. [And I've actually been doing this for months without even realizing it was a thing.]

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A is positioned in the lower center of the frame. He is looking directly at the camera and speaking. He holds the microphone of his wired earphones near his mouth with his right hand. He uses his left hand to point upwards.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is superimposed over various app interfaces, including an AI prompt screen and a messaging app. He is explaining how he uses voice dictation for different tasks. Captions appear over his chest.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: You see, all my AI prompts, messages, emails, I don't even type them anymore. [You see, all my AI prompts, messages, emails, I don't even type them anymore.]
Character A says: I speak them. [I speak them.]

In the top right, a woman speaks into a smartphone held near her mouth. In the bottom left, a man with headphones speaks into a smartphone. In the bottom right, a man with glasses smiles while looking at a laptop.
Character A is positioned in the center of the frame. He is looking directly at the camera and speaking. He holds the microphone of his wired earphones near his mouth with his right hand.

scenes.visual_description: Character A is superimposed over an App Store page for 'Wispr Flow' and then a grid of stock footage showing people using voice dictation. He encourages the viewer to try the app. Captions appear over his chest.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: That's what Wispr Flow does. [That's what Wispr Flow does.]
Character A says: Now most people are just figuring this out, but you should get ahead of it. [Now most people are just figuring this out, but you should get ahead of it.]
Character A says: Try Wispr Flow for free today. [Try Wispr Flow for free today.]
